text.title: error-handling-in-vui Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for error-handling-in-vui as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Repeating the exact same error prompt more than twice without adding new information.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Creates a frustrating loop with no path forward; users abandon the interface after the second identical prompt.

failure-mode.description: Silently resolving ambiguous input by picking the highest-confidence interpretation without confirmation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Users experience unexpected behavior with no explanation; trust is damaged and errors compound.

failure-mode.description: A voice-only interface with no fallback modality at Tier 3.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Users who cannot succeed with voice have no recourse; the interface is inaccessible to them.
